CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT, data XML);
SELECT id, XMLType(data).toObject() AS obj FROM xml_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT a.id, b.value FROM (SELECT id, XMLType(data).toObject() AS obj FROM xml_data) AS a JOIN (SELECT id, XMLType(data).toObject() AS obj FROM xml_data WHERE id > 1) AS b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT a.id, b.id FROM xml_data AS a JOIN xml_data AS b ON XMLType(a.data) = XMLType(b.data) WHERE a.id != b.id;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM xml_data GROUP BY XMLType(data).toObject() HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT XMLType(data).toObject() AS values, SUM(id) FROM xml_data GROUP BY XMLType(data).toObject();
WITH RankedXML AS (SELECT id, XMLType(data).toObject() AS obj, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS rn FROM xml_data) SELECT * FROM RankedXML WHERE rn <= 10;
